steps.title: Use the area formula
steps.content:
The area of a circle with radius $r$ is found by squaring the radius and multiplying by $\pi$:
$$
A=\pi r^2
$$

steps.title: Substitute the radius
steps.content: The radius is $17$ meters, so square $17$ before multiplying by $\pi$: $$ A=\pi(17)^2=289\pi $$ The answer is D.
